events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: non-IC can in insulation contact. Non-IC recessed luminaire in contact with insulation violates NEC 410 requirements. Non-IC rated recessed fixtures must maintain clearance from insulation (typically 3 inches). This is non-compliant and a fire hazard. Decision: fail. Risk: high/critical. Component conditions: non-compliant, installed-defective.
